fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: West Virginia Physical Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a physical therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to West Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: physical therapist license reciprocity west virginia, how to transfer physical therapist license to west virginia, physical therapist compact west virginia, west virginia physical therapist endorsement application

board.name: West Virginia Board of Physical Therapy

license_types.title: PT, DPT
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a physical therapist in West Virginia.

steps.title: Create Account and Submit Online Application
steps.description: Register on the West Virginia Secretary of State's Licensing Portal (bsld.wv.gov), select the 'Physical Therapist' application, and complete all required sections of the online form.

steps.title: Submit Official Transcripts
steps.description: Arrange for your official academic transcripts, verifying a Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT) or equivalent degree from an accredited program, to be sent directly to the West Virginia Board of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Pass NPTE and Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Register with FSBPT for the National Physical Therapy Examination (NPTE) and ensure your scores are sent to the WV Board. Additionally, complete the West Virginia Jurisprudence Examination, typically accessible via the online portal during your application.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow instructions provided within the online application to complete a state and federal fingerprint-based criminal background check as required by the Board.

steps.title: Provide Verifications and Supporting Documents
steps.description: Submit any required verifications of licensure from other states (if applicable) and other supporting documentation as requested by the Board, either through the portal or by mail.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination).

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NPTE. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a West Virginia physical therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does West Virginia have reciprocity for physical therapists?
faqs.answer: Yes. West Virginia participates in the PT Compact. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in West Virginia without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my physical therapist license to West Virginia?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in West Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Physical Therapist in West Virginia
hero.dek: To apply for a Physical Therapist license in West Virginia, utilize the West Virginia Secretary of State's Licensing Portal, which serves as the online application system for initial licensure and endorsement.

official_links.portal_name: West Virginia Secretary of State's Licensing Portal
official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the West Virginia Secretary of State's Licensing Portal login page, click on 'Register a New Account', follow the prompts to create a user ID and password, and verify your email address. Once registered, log in to select the Physical Therapist application.
